title: ✅ FRACC (2022)
subtitle: Feedback Rater and Assessment for College Classrooms
body: Developed a system for digitizing and quantifying qualitative feedback in higher education, bridging the gap between abstract student comments and actionable, data-driven grading metrics.

title: ✅ CELTIC-I (2023)
subtitle: Collaborative Env. for Learning and Teaching with Integrated Coding
body: Built the foundational infrastructure for a real-time, multi-user coding environment, integrating shared terminals and synchronized editor states to facilitate seamless peer collaboration.

title: ✅ PACTS (2023)
subtitle: Pedagogical AI Copilot for Teachers and Students
body: An AI-driven 'teaching assistant' designed to provide real-time scaffolding for students during coding tasks, ensuring help is provided without bypassing the pedagogical learning process.

title: ✅ SEPTOR (2023)
subtitle: Student Exam Practice Tool with Organised Resources
body: A centralized curriculum-mapping platform that links exam requirements to high-quality study materials, providing students a structured path from practice questions to deep conceptual resources.

title: ✅ RAMP (2024)
subtitle: Retrieval Augmented Memory Palace for HCI in Learning
body: A novel HCI interface merging the ancient 'Method of Loci' with RAG to anchor complex data points within a virtual spatial environment, significantly improving long-term information retention.

title: ✅ STAMPEDE (2024)
subtitle: Stable Diffusion Tracked to Memory Palaces for Easy and Direct Education
body: Augments spatial learning by using Stable Diffusion to automatically generate unique, context-aware visual anchors for memory palaces based on a user's specific study materials.

title: ✅ CELTIC-II (2024)
subtitle: Collaborative Env. for Learning and Teaching with Integrated Coding
body: The second iteration focused on UI/UX optimization and workspace management, introducing automated tidying features for complex, multi-file collaborative programming sessions.

title: ✅ BRAIN-DMP (2024) 🏆
subtitle: Generate Visualisation of Brains for Large Language Models
body: Nominated for Best CS Project. Creates interactive, high-fidelity visualizations of neural network activations, mapping how an LLM processes logic during real-time inference.

title: ✅ LLM-NOTE (2024)
subtitle: Transcribe and Note YouTube Videos with Local LLM
body: A privacy-first tool that processes video content locally to automate transcription and summarization, allowing students to generate structured study notes from video lectures without external data transfer.

title: ✅ CLUSTER (2024)
subtitle: Classroom Simulator for Undergrad. Teaching and Education Students
body: A 'Flight Simulator for Teachers' that uses diverse LLM personas to simulate classroom dynamics, allowing education students to practice classroom management and query response in a safe environment.

title: ✅ MUSIC-LLM (2024)
subtitle: Create Playlists Ideas with Large Language Models
body: A creative discovery tool using LLMs to generate complex thematic playlist ideas and musical discovery paths based on nuanced user mood and preference prompts.

title: ✅ DOCTALK (2024)
subtitle: Discuss Research Papers Locally with LLM and RAG
body: A research-focused interface using local RAG to 'interview' PDF libraries, allowing researchers to extract methodologies and cross-reference citations with high precision and zero data leakage.

title: BRAIN-DNC (2025)
subtitle: Incorporate 3D Gaussian Splatting for SPARSE Project
body: Advanced visualization research that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting into the SPARSE learning environment, enabling the rendering of hyper-realistic 3D educational objects within spatial data contexts.

title: KASPER (2025)
subtitle: K-Means Adaptive System for Personalising Education Resources
body: An algorithmic approach to personalized learning that uses K-Means clustering to analyze learning styles and dynamically group resources to target specific student knowledge gaps.

title: ✅ GAELTACHT-VR (2025)
subtitle: VR Learning Environment for Interactive Irish Learning
body: An immersive VR experience designed for Irish language preservation, utilizing speech recognition to facilitate natural conversation and cultural immersion in a simulated Gaeltacht.

title: CELTIC-III (2025)
subtitle: Collaborative Env. for Learning and Teaching with Integrated Coding
body: The agentic evolution of the platform, introducing autonomous AI collaborators that join the session for live debugging, code refactoring, and peer-review alongside human students.

title: ✅ PROMPT-DB (2025)
subtitle: Full-Stack Prompt Database for CS. Department Maynooth
body: A centralized, full-stack hub for prompt engineering, allowing faculty and students to share, version-control, and benchmark effective prompts for academic and research use.

title: DND-DISCORD (2025)
subtitle: Use Group of LLM Actors to Simulate a DND Adventure
body: An experiment in multi-agent orchestration where a group of unique LLM personas interact on Discord to manage and participate in a cohesive, long-form tabletop RPG campaign.

title: PRUNES (2025)
subtitle: Generative Analysis / Comparison of LLM Structures & Connections
body: A research tool that compares the structural architecture and connection weights of different LLMs to identify redundant paths and optimize overall model efficiency.

title: BRAIN-DMP II (2025)
subtitle: Generate Visualisation of Brains for Large Language Models
body: The next evolution in LLM visualization, expanding on 3D weight mapping and real-time activation tracking within increasingly complex model architectures.

title: AWARE (2025)
subtitle: Analysing and Generation of Conciousness in LLM (MoE)
body: Investigates emergent properties in Mixture of Experts (MoE) models, analyzing how specific expert routing mimics specialized cognitive functions and simulated consciousness.

title: PSYCH-AI (2025)
subtitle: Psycho-Analysis of Contemporary LLMs (Reasoning)
body: A psycho-analytical study of modern LLMs, using behavioral testing to assess reasoning capabilities and the logical implications of their decision-making frameworks.

title: APPLE (2025)
subtitle: LLM Feedback Analysis (Reasoning, RAG, Prompts etc.)
body: An analytical framework for evaluating the intersection of reasoning, RAG efficiency, and prompt sensitivity in high-level model feedback loops.

title: PEDAL-MATCH (2025)
subtitle: AI Tool That Listens to A Guitar Pedal and Creates a Digital Pedal
body: A bridge between analog and digital audio using machine learning to analyze harmonic profiles and clipping characteristics, generating high-fidelity digital twins of physical hardware.

title: CYCL-CAM (2025)
subtitle: View Photos with Several Filters without Modification
body: A non-destructive image viewer that allows for complex, multi-layered filter stacks in real-time without ever altering the original raw pixel data.

title: LLM-DISCO (2025)
subtitle: Mobile Flutter App for Local Ollama Services
body: A sleek mobile Flutter application designed to provide a portable, high-performance interface for managing and interacting with local Ollama-hosted LLM services.

title: LLM-THERAPIST (2026)
subtitle: Context-Specific LLM for Therapy and Guidance
body: A context-specific LLM trained for ethical guidance and therapy-adjacent support, focusing on supportive dialogue and safety-guarded mental wellness assistance.

title: LLM-BOARD (2025)
subtitle: Simulate & Analysis of LLM Groups (Viva/Interview)
body: A high-stakes simulation environment where a group of LLM 'examiners' conducts a mock Viva, testing a student's reasoning and thesis defense against diverse academic personas.

title: EDU-ADAPT (SPUR)
subtitle: Adaptive LLM System for Assisting Neurodiverse Students
body: A specialized adaptive system that dynamically adjusts educational content complexity and delivery methods to better serve the needs of neurodiverse students.

title: LLM-BRAND
subtitle: Feasibility and Analysis of LLM Watermarks
body: Research into the technical feasibility and detection of LLM-generated watermarks to ensure academic integrity and provide a path for digital provenance.

title: ✅ LLM-ACCESS (2025)
subtitle: Converting Higer Ed. Material for Accessibility
body: An accessibility-first tool that converts traditional higher education materials into diverse formats optimized for various learning and physical accessibility requirements.

title: ✅ GAINS (2025)
subtitle: Generative AI for Nutrition & Statistics in Bodybuilding Support
body: A specialized assistant for high-performance bodybuilding, utilizing generative AI to track nutrition metrics and provide statistical training insights.

title: ✅ AIR (2025)
subtitle: AI Audiobook Reader (Convert PDF to Audiobook)
body: A generative audio tool that converts academic PDFs into high-quality audiobooks with natural prosody and context-aware pacing for auditory learning.

title: Prompt Guarding (2025)
subtitle: Research into Limiting LLM Feedback for Academics using Guards
body: Explores the use of 'guards' to limit LLM feedback, ensuring students use AI as a tool for critical thinking rather than a source of direct answers.

title: ✅ ACADEMIC-SOCIAL (2026)
subtitle: Goodreads for Academic Papers
body: A social discovery platform for academic research, acting as 'Goodreads for academia' to facilitate paper discovery, peer discussion, and shared annotation.

title: COMP-CODE
subtitle: Live Competitive Coding Pedagogy Env!
body: A real-time pedagogical environment for competitive programming, providing live feedback and performance tracking for CS students during timed sessions.

title: BRAIN-MTR
subtitle: Creating an AI with Dwelling Thoughts to Simulate Consciousness
body: Explores cognitive architectures by implementing internal 'dwelling thought' loops, simulating a digital stream of consciousness that processes information between prompts.

title: PSYCH-AI
subtitle: Psycho-Analysis of Several Contemporary LLMs and Implications
body: A comparative psycho-analytical study of various contemporary LLMs, investigating their reasoning frameworks and the ethical implications of their logical biases.

title: LLM-ALZHEIMER
subtitle: Detect Patterns in Speech and Provide Personal Bot to Prevent Decline
body: Uses NLP to detect early linguistic markers of cognitive decline and provides a personalized bot companion designed for cognitive stimulation and memory exercises.

title: MCP-TRAIN
subtitle: Developing LLM Training Pipeline focused on RL with MCP tools
body: Utilizes Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) to develop a Reinforcement Learning training pipeline, allowing models to learn through direct environmental tool interaction.
